privileged_info_summary: This is a Java optimization task using Project Gutenberg eBook #2600 (War and Peace by Leo Tolstoy, 3.36 MB) as input data. The task provides a Maven project (Java 17, JUnit 4.13.2) with 5 source files containing specific performance anti-patterns: WordCounter uses ArrayList.contains() for O(n) lookups, ReportGenerator uses String += concatenation in loops, DuplicateDetector uses O(n²) nested loops, TextFileReader reads files byte-by-byte with string concatenation, and TopWordsFinder uses bubble sort. The task requires fixing these patterns and verifying tests pass within 600 seconds with a maximum of 80 steps.
